message:
Add stub for changelog sidebar to fix builds without sync

The build failed when `pnpm sync:changelog` hadn't been run because
`src/sidebar-changelog.generated.ts` didn't exist. This adds a stub
file that exports empty defaults, allowing builds to work out of the
box. The sync:changelog script overwrites this with real data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
